title: Casey's® and Gatorade® Team Up to Fuel Sports for All
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's and Gatorade® are partnering this fall to Fuel Sports for All through a promotion with giving back at the heart of it. The two companies have joined forces to empower athletes of all abilities and offer guests the chance to win one of 1,500 Casey's gift cards, each valued at up to $15, through the Gatorade Fuel Sports for All Giveaway. “Gatorade and Casey's share a passion for fueling the next generation and ensuring sports access and inclusivity,” said Je.

title: Why Casey's General Stores Stock Was Up This Week
text: Casey's latest earnings results show a resilient business to the macroeconomic challenges affecting other retailers. Its focus on the rural market is working to its advantage.

title: Casey's General Stores Stock: Boring Is Beautiful
text: Casey's General Stores, Inc. has outperformed tech giants like Apple and Microsoft in terms of stock performance. The company operates convenience stores that double as liquor stores and pizza chains, with a focus on rural areas. Casey's consistent LSD unit growth and MSD same store sales growth has translated into double-digit earnings growth. CASY is a classic GARP story that has room to grow.

title: Casey's Competes With QSRs to Draw New Customers Into the Fold
text: As convenience retailers look to compete with quick-service restaurants (QSRs), Casey's General Stores is seeing its pizza business bring new customers to its stores and digital platforms. title: Why Casey's General Stores Stock Popped Today
text: Casey's General Stores kicked off its new fiscal year with significantly stronger-than-expected earnings. Management called it a "great start" as the convenience store chain begins to implement a new three-year strategic plan.

title: Casey's Shares Hit Record as Convenience Store Operator Sells More Pizzas

title: Casey's (CASY) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: Casey's General Stores (CASY) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Casey's General Stores (CASY) came out with quarterly earnings of $4.52 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.36 per share. This compares to earnings of $4.09 per share a year ago.

title: Whole pizza pies, thin crust pizza give Casey's General Stores a lift
text: Shares of convenience-store chain Casey's General Stores Inc. CASY, -1.02% rose after hours Monday after its first-quarter per-share profit and same-store sales inside its retail locations topped Wall Street's estimates, with management crediting “whole pizza pies and the successful launch of Casey's Thin Crust Pizza” for the gains despite a “more normalized” backdrop. The company reported net income of $169.2 million, or $4.52 a share, compared with $152.9 million, or $4.09 a share, in the same quarter last year.

title: Casey's General Stores shares rise as 1Q earnings top expectations
text: Casey's General Stores Inc (NASDAQ:CASY) shares rose in after-hours trading on Monday after the chain of convenience stores reported better-than-expected first quarter fiscal 2024 earnings. For the three months ended July 31, 2023, the company posted earnings per share of $4.52, up 11% year-over-year from $4.09 and ahead of the Street estimate of $3.36, according to Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: Casey's Announces First Quarter Results
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's General Stores, Inc. ("Casey's" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: CASY) one of the leading convenience store chains in the United States, today announced financial results for the three months ended July 31, 2023. First Quarter Key Highlights Diluted EPS of $4.52, up 11% from the same period a year ago. title: Survey Shows Nearly Half of U.S. Adults Would Eat Breakfast More Often if Pizza Was on the Menu
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--What do you typically have for breakfast? If you're living in Casey's Country, the answer might be pizza. According to a new study, Casey's (Nasdaq: CASY) found that pizza is a popular choice for breakfast among U.S. adults surveyed. The survey found pizza for breakfast simply makes the day start better: 44% of people would be inclined to eat breakfast more often if pizza was on the menu. More than half of adults (52%) wish pizza was considered a more traditional.
